judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent broadened the track selection using a fuzzy artist filter and included track_ids 4628 and 14080 (from "Bruce Maginnis") along with the exact match 4122, then aggregated across all three in query_db:24, which made iTunes appear as the top store instead of using only the correct "Brucqe Maginnis" track (4122) where Amazon Music is highest.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly included sales from additional track_ids (4628 and 14080) found via a broad title match in query_db:8—despite the artist being "Bruce Maginnis" rather than "Brucqe Maginnis"—and aggregated them in query_db:10/execute_python:12, leading to iTunes as the top store instead of using only track_id 4122 where Amazon Music is highest.

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After identifying the correct track (track_id 4122) for 'Street Hype' by Brucqe Maginnis, the agent broadened selection to all 'Street Hype' tracks regardless of artist (query_db:8) and included sales for 'Bruce Maginnis' (query_db:10) in the aggregation (execute_python:14), causing the max store to be iTunes instead of the correct Amazon Music.

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent only aggregated sales for three track_ids found via a simple LIKE search (4122, 4628, 14080) and returned iTunes as top, but by not performing comprehensive entity resolution to include all duplicate records of 'Street Hype' by Brucqe/Bruce Maginnis, it omitted relevant sales that would have shown Amazon Music as the highest earner.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent used an overly broad OR filter in the tracks lookup ("title LIKE '%Street Hype%' OR artist LIKE '%Brucqe%'"), then treated returned records by "Bruce Maginnis" as the same song and included their sales (notably the 4628 iTunes sale), leading to an incorrect aggregation where iTunes topped instead of Amazon Music.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
